name: SurveySparrow API
what_it_does: SurveySparrow REST API for conversational survey and feedback platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage surveys, retrieve response data, trigger NPS and CSAT surveys, access contact data, and integrate feedback workflows into CX and employee experience systems. SurveySparrow is known for chat-like survey UX and omnichannel feedback collection.
use_cases: Triggering NPS and CSAT surveys from post-interaction CX agents
Retrieving survey response data from feedback analytics agents
Managing survey templates and contacts from CX operations agents
Integrating SurveySparrow feedback into CRM and support ticketing agents
not_for: Academic research surveys at scale (SurveySparrow is CX/enterprise focused)
best_when: A customer experience or HR team using SurveySparrow wants AI agents to trigger surveys, analyze response trends, and integrate feedback data into CRM or HR workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Survey responses are personal data including opinions, satisfaction scores, and employee feedback. GDPR compliance required. Employee survey data is particularly sensitive.

auth.notes: SurveySparrow supports API token auth and OAuth 2.0 for third-party integrations. Tokens are account-scoped.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: limited surveys and responses per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic, Starter, Business, and Enterprise plans scaling responses and features
pricing.notes: Competitive pricing. API access on paid plans. Enterprise plan for advanced CX features.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; not publicly detailed

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Survey responses include personal opinions and employee feedback — handle with care
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API access gated by paid plan — verify plan level before integration
Rate limits not publicly documented — test limits in staging before production deployment
Employee survey data particularly sensitive — ensure appropriate access controls
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Survey response data including employee and customer opinions. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. API token auth. EU data residency available.

security_score_components.security_notes: Survey response PII and employee data. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. API token and OAuth auth.
